title: orontium
intro: Orontium, also known as the golden club or yellow mandarin, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orontiaceae. The plant's rhizome and roots are used in herbal medicine, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orontium include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Orontium can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
